allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5500 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($conn\){ Write-Output "LISTENING on 5500 \(PID $\($conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\)\)" } else { Write-Output "NOTHING listening on 5500" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5500/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), length=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "FETCH FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($ports = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5500,5501,5502,3000,8080,8000,8081,4200,5173 } | Select-Object LocalPort,@{n='PID';e={$_.OwningProcess}} -Unique; if\($ports\){ $ports | ForEach-Object { $pname=\(Get-Process -Id $_.PID -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName; Write-Output "Port $\($_.LocalPort\) <- $pname \(PID $\($_.PID\)\)" } } else { Write-Output "No dev server on common ports \(5500/5501/3000/8080/8000/5173/...\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Listeners on 5500 \(and nearby\) ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -ge 5500 -and $_.LocalPort -le 5510 } | ForEach-Object { $p=\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName; Write-Output \("Port {0}  Addr {1}  <- {2} \(PID {3}\)" -f $_.LocalPort,$_.LocalAddress,$p,$_.OwningProcess\) }; Write-Output "=== VS Code / node processes ==="; Get-Process Code,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Network profile \(must be Private for easy LAN access\) ==="; Get-NetConnectionProfile | Select-Object Name,InterfaceAlias,NetworkCategory | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output "=== Firewall profiles ==="; Get-NetFirewallProfile | Select-Object Name,Enabled,DefaultInboundAction | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output "=== Any inbound allow rule for 5500? ==="; try { $pf = Get-NetFirewallPortFilter -Protocol TCP -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 5500 }; if\($pf\){ $pf | ForEach-Object { $ru = $_ | Get-NetFirewallRule -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($ru\){ Write-Output \("{0} | dir={1} | action={2} | enabled={3} | profile={4}" -f $ru.DisplayName,$ru.Direction,$ru.Action,$ru.Enabled,$ru.Profile\) } } } else { Write-Output "No firewall rule for TCP 5500 \(inbound from phone will be blocked if DefaultInboundAction=Block\)" } } catch { Write-Output "rule lookup error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($l = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5500 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($l\){ $l | ForEach-Object { $p=\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName; Write-Output \("LISTENING 5500  Addr={0}  <- {1} \(PID {2}\)" -f $_.LocalAddress,$p,$_.OwningProcess\) } } else { Write-Output "Still NOTHING on 5500" }; Write-Output "--- local fetch test ---"; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest 'http://127.0.0.1:5500/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; Write-Output "PC localhost: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "PC localhost FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2=Invoke-WebRequest 'http://192.168.29.207:5500/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; Write-Output "LAN IP \(PC self\): HTTP $\($r2.StatusCode\), len=$\($r2.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "LAN IP FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Any web-ish listener \(3000-9000\) ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -ge 3000 -and $_.LocalPort -le 9000 } | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique | ForEach-Object { $p=\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName; Write-Output \("Port {0}  Addr={1}  <- {2}" -f $_.LocalPort,$_.LocalAddress,$p\) }; Write-Output "=== node processes ==="; $n=Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($n\){ $n | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } else { Write-Output "NO node process running" })

PowerShell($f='d:\\ashishram.in\\script.js'; $c=Get-Content $f -Raw; foreach\($ch in @\('{','}','\(','\)','[',']'\)\){ $n=\([regex]::Escape\($ch\)\); $count=\([regex]::Matches\($c,$n\)\).Count; Write-Output "$ch : $count" }; Write-Output \("backtick count \(must be even\): " + \([regex]::Matches\($c,'`'\)\).Count\))
